summary: Stage 7 FINAL workflow fix (10 surgical fixes) — backend + frontend verification. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_workflow_fix.py (8 tests, 100% passing) covering Fix 3 auto-triage (tiny<$1 → private/noise_tiny_amount, transfer-to → private/internal_transfer, account-fee → candidate/bank_fee+accountant_review, interest credit → confirmed/interest_income), Fix 6 empty-bin (idempotent zeros on empty state + create→soft-delete→empty round-trip increments db_deleted), and Fix 9 accountant_review lockstep (No→required=False+status=Complete; Yes→required=True+status='Accountant review'+reason='Flagged by user' default). Full regression suite: 114 passed, 4 skipped (up from 105+5; +8 new tests, -1 skip drained). Frontend Playwright on live preview URL verified: Dashboard payg-section + payg-manage-link → /register?category=02%20PAYG%20Income ✓; BankTransactions filter-status defaults to 'Needs action (default)' with all 5 expected options ✓; RubbishBin empty-bin-btn correctly HIDDEN when bin empty ('Rubbish bin is empty' UI) ✓; EvidenceRegister loads with paste hint 'paste a screenshot (Ctrl/Cmd+V)' ✓; ErrorBoundary not triggered on normal nav ✓. Fixes 1, 2, 5, 7, 10 verified by code review against the reference files — all data-testids/try-catches/listeners/Routes wrapping present and correct.
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 fixes implemented correctly per spec. UploadQueue.jsx decide/cancelOne/cancelAll/clearDone wrapped in try/catch + finally→load() (lines 84-110), summary band at lines 215-227 with all 6 glyphs (filed/inbox/duplicate/error/cancelled/in-progress) and data-testid='upload-summary'.
ErrorBoundary.jsx (48 lines) uses correct React class-component pattern; App.js line 23 wraps <Routes> ✓.

bank_transaction_extractor.py classify_transaction_by_rules has the 4 auto-triage blocks (0a-0d) BEFORE the main rules engine — correct precedence so tiny/transfer/fee/interest never fall through to AI.

server.py PATCH /documents/{id} lines 956-968 correctly recomputes accountant_review_required + status in lockstep (No→clear+Complete if not Red; Yes→required+'Accountant review'+default reason). Verified via 2 pytest cases.
POST /api/rubbish-bin/empty (line 2128) wraps Drive trash per-file in try/except → granular drive_failed[] reporting; idempotent on empty bin (returns zeros). Verified.
EvidenceRegister.jsx paste handler (lines 60-89) correctly ignores INPUT/TEXTAREA targets, accepts only image/* clipboard items, names files screenshot-{ts}.{ext}.
BankTransactions.jsx STATUS_OPTIONS (line 27-33) + default useState('needs_action') (line 38) + frontend-side filter at line 65 hide used_in_return/private/noise correctly.
Dashboard.jsx PAYG section (line 248) has payg-section, payg-empty empty-state cell (line 262), payg-source-link-{id} per-row source links (line 273), payg-manage-link top-right.
RubbishBin.jsx empty-bin-btn (line 88) correctly gated on docs.length>0; Dialog with empty-bin-confirm-input + empty-bin-confirm-btn disabled until input='DELETE' (line 152).
server.py is still 2501 lines — consider splitting into routers (admin, dashboard, bank, documents) for maintainability. Same comment as iteration_4; non-blocking.
